meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for iPad repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: iPad Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Replacement
page.metaDescription: Professional iPad repair in Winnipeg. Screen replacement, battery, charging port repair for iPad Pro, iPad Air, iPad mini & all models. Same-day service available.
page.h1: Expert iPad Repair in Winnipeg: Fast, Professional, and Guaranteed
page.heroDescription: Whether it's a shattered screen on an iPad Pro or a battery that won't hold a charge on an iPad Air, you need more than a quick fix—you need a guarantee. Mobile Tech Lab is Winnipeg's highest-rated destination for tablet repairs.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Dealing with fused LCD and digitizer assemblies for a factory-quality finish. Glass-only repairs available for iPad Air and Mini to save you money.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: If your iPad dies at 20% or feels sluggish, a fresh battery can add years to its lifespan.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: We clean before we replace. If damaged, we perform microsoldering to restore Lightning or USB-C connection.

services.name: Liquid Damage Recovery
services.description: Spilled coffee? Our ultrasonic cleaning process is the best chance your data has for survival.

services.name: Software & Boot Issues
services.description: Stuck on the Apple logo? Our technicians perform advanced restores and data recovery.

services.name: Button & Sensor Repair
services.description: Home buttons, power buttons, Touch ID, and Face ID sensor repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Transparent Pricing
advantage_pillars.description: iPad 9 glass repair from $99+tax. Multiple quality tiers.

advantage_pillars.title: Same-Day Service
advantage_pillars.description: Most repairs completed same day. Rush Service available for urgent needs.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty.

advantage_pillars.title: Apple IRP Certified
advantage_pillars.description: Access to Genuine Apple Parts, diagnostics, and specialized tools.

model_categories.title: iPad Pro
model_categories.description: ProMotion displays require a delicate touch.

model_categories.title: iPad Air & Mini
model_categories.description: Glass-only repairs to save you money.

model_categories.title: All Models
model_categories.description: Don't see your model? We service all generations.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: iPad repair costs depend heavily on the model. Apple's iPad repair service documentation outlines warranty coverage.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that an iPad Pro screen can cost more than the tablet originally did. iFixit's iPad teardowns show the adhesive-sealed designs.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches or exceeds your iPad's current value, we'll explain that.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery or data transfer to a new device may still be possible.

faqs.question: How much does iPad repair cost in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: iPad 9 glass repairs start at $99. Newer iPad Pro or Air models typically cost more. Learn more about how repair pricing works.

faqs.question: How long does it take to repair a cracked iPad screen?
faqs.answer: Most screen replacements are completed within the same business day.

faqs.question: Do you use Genuine Apple Parts?
faqs.answer: As an IRP-certified shop, we can use Genuine Apple parts for many repairs.

faqs.question: What warranty do you offer on iPad repairs?
faqs.answer: Screen repair warranties vary by part quality tier (30 days to lifetime). Battery replacements come with a 90-day warranty.

faqs.question: Can you fix a water-damaged iPad?
faqs.answer: We offer data recovery services with a high success rate.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
